'''鈭歜-r-ng-m''' ('''kabarngemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alum|alum]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alum|alum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-r-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| kabarngemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibarngemoko|thibarngemoko]] || [[word:jibarngemoko|jibarngemoko]] || [[word:shibarngemoko|shibarngemoko]] || [[word:kibarngemoko|kibarngemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubarngemoko|thuthubarngemoko]] || [[word:jujubarngemoko|jujubarngemoko]] || [[word:shushubarngemoko|shushubarngemoko]] || [[word:kukubarngemoko|kukubarngemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubarngemoko|thubarngemoko]] || [[word:jubarngemoko|jubarngemoko]] || [[word:shubarngemoko|shubarngemoko]] || [[word:kubarngemoko|kubarngemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubarngemoko|thubarngemoko]] || [[word:jubarngemoko|jubarngemoko]] || [[word:shubarngemoko|shubarngemoko]] || [[word:kubarngemoko|kubarngemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebarngemoko|thebarngemoko]] || [[word:jebarngemoko|jebarngemoko]] || [[word:shebarngemoko|shebarngemoko]] || [[word:kebarngemoko|kebarngemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobarngemoko|thothobarngemoko]] || [[word:jojobarngemoko|jojobarngemoko]] || [[word:shoshobarngemoko|shoshobarngemoko]] || [[word:kokobarngemoko|kokobarngemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobarngemoko|thobarngemoko]] || [[word:jobarngemoko|jobarngemoko]] || [[word:shobarngemoko|shobarngemoko]] || [[word:kobarngemoko|kobarngemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobarngemoko|thobarngemoko]] || [[word:jobarngemoko|jobarngemoko]] || [[word:shobarngemoko|shobarngemoko]] || [[word:kobarngemoko|kobarngemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙barngemoko|th忙barngemoko]] || [[word:j忙barngemoko|j忙barngemoko]] || [[word:sh忙barngemoko|sh忙barngemoko]] || [[word:k忙barngemoko|k忙barngemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabarngemoko|thathabarngemoko]] || [[word:jajabarngemoko|jajabarngemoko]] || [[word:shashabarngemoko|shashabarngemoko]] || [[word:kakabarngemoko|kakabarngemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabarngemoko|thabarngemoko]] || [[word:jabarngemoko|jabarngemoko]] || [[word:shabarngemoko|shabarngemoko]] || [[word:kabarngemoko|kabarngemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabarngemoko|thabarngemoko]] || [[word:jabarngemoko|jabarngemoko]] || [[word:shabarngemoko|shabarngemoko]] || [[word:kabarngemoko|kabarngemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabarngemithi|shabarngemithi]] || [[word:shabarngemiji|shabarngemiji]] || [[word:shabarngemishi|shabarngemishi]] || [[word:shabarngemiki|shabarngemiki]]
